news.t: Why Dimensional Fund Advisors is launching its mutual funds as ETFs
Two of Dimensional's mutual funds launch as ETFs. Here's why

holdings.infoBox: DFAU is an equity ETF with a total of 2173 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 6.83%, Apple at 6.12%, Microsoft at 4.29%, Amazon.com at 3.25%, and Alphabet at 2.86%.

overview.description: The Dimensional US Core Equity Market ETF (DFAU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively selects US equities of all sizes with a tilt toward small-cap companies, seeking to provide long-term capital appreciation. DFAU was launched on Nov 17, 2020 and is issued by Dimensional.

data.title: ETF Edge: Returns tend to be strong and positive after sharp downturns, says Dimensional's O'Reilly
data.text: Gerard O'Reilly, Dimensional Fund Advisors co-CEO, joins the 'Halftime Report' to discuss the markets and what investors should do after the big sell-off.

data.title: 'Timing isn't everything': Top ETF strategy pitfalls
data.text: CNBC's Bob Pisani discusses how active management is making a comeback in the ETF market with Kim Arthur of Main Management and Wes Crill of Dimensional Fund Advisors.
